sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Thukham Hilh Siate leh Farisi Mite Mawhsak

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in mihonte leh a nungzuite kiangah thu gen a
“Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite, Moses' aana a nei-in thugente ahih manun
amaute' gen khempeuh zui-in sem un la, ahi zongin amaute pen a gen bangun gamtalo uh ahih manin amaute' gamtat bangin gamta kei un
Amaute in midangte tungah vangik mahmah suanin khihcip uh a, ahi zongin tua van a puakpih dingin a khutmeno khat nangawn uh a tangsak nuam kei uh hi
Amaute in a sepna khempeuh uh mite' muhtheih dingin a hih se uh hi. Amaute in a talsuan leh a banbulhte uh a golpipi-in bawlin, a puanmongteep uh a sau theithei-in a bawl uh hi
Pawi sungah a om uh ciangin uliante' tutna dinga a kibawl munah tunuam se uh a, kikhopna innsungah zong uliante tutna tutphah nuampente tungah a tunuam diak uh hi
Mihon lakah mite in hopihin, ‘Sia aw,’ a cihding uh a ut uh hi
Ahi zongin note pen, ‘Sia,’ na kicihding uh hilo hi. Sia khat bek na nei uh a, no adangte khempeuh unau khat na hi uh hi
Vantungah Pa khat bek nei na hih manun leitungah kuamah dang, Pa, na ci kei un
Topa dingin Khrih bek nei na hih manun note khatlekhat, ‘Topa,’ na kici kei un
Note lakah a lianpenpa, na nasem uh hi ding hi
A kiliansakte khempeuh in niamkhiatna thuak ding uh a, a kiniamkhiatte khempeuh a lianin kibawl ding hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in vantung ki-ukna sungah mite a lut theihlohna dingin kong na khakcip uh hi. Note lah na lutnuam kei uh a, a lutnuamte lah na lutsak kei uh hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Meigong numeite tungah nuamtak sa-in a neihsa teng uh laksakin na zangmang uh a, mite in mihoih hong saktheihna ding na deihna-un thu saupipi na ngen uh hi. Hih bangin na gamtatna uh hangin na gim thuak ding uh nasiazaw kan lai ding hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in mi khat bek nangawn na ngah zawhna ding uh na hanciamna-un leitung tuitung lumletin khual na zin uh a, na ngahsunte uh zong note zah nihin a siahuai, hell khuk tungding mi na suah uh hi

“Mittaw a bang lamhilhte aw, note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in, ‘Mi khat biakinn tawh a kiciam leh phamawhlo a, ahi zongin biakinn sunga a om kham tawh a kiciam leh a kiciamna in len hi,’ na ci uh hi
Note pen mihai mittaw lamlak taktak na hi uh hi. Kham thupizaw ahi hiam, ahih kei leh tua kham a siangtho a suaksak biakinn thupizaw ahi hiam
Note in, ‘Mi khat, biakna tau tawh kiciam leh phamawhlo a, ahi zongin biakna tau tungah a kipia letsongte tawh a kiciam leh a kiciamna in len hi,’ na ci uh hi
Mittaw mite aw, a kipia nate thupizaw ahi hiam, ahih kei leh tua nate a siangtho a suaksak biakna tau thupizaw ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin biakna tau tawh a kiciam mite pen a tunga a om nate khempeuh tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi
Biakinn tawh a kiciam mite pen a sungah a tengpa tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi
Vantung tawh a kiciam mite zong Pasian' kumpi tokhom tawh a kiciam hi a, tua tokhom tungah a tupa tawh zong a kiciam ahi hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in Pasian tungah lengmasel, masala, leh kummin sing namtui-a kipanin meh namtui nam khempeuh, sawmah khat pia napi-in, thukham sungah a thupizaw ahi thutang, hehpihna, leh thumante na don kei uh hi. Adangte nusia tuanloin hih thute na zuihding uh ahi hi

A makai ding hinapi-in, mittaw bangin bangmah tumloteng thupi ngaihsutin, a thupiteng na nusiakha uh a, tui tawh na dawnkhop khaklohna dingun thovai khaih napi-in kalaoh a nawmvalhkha tawh na kibang uh hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in hai leh kuangte a pualam na siangsak uh a, ahi zongin tuate sungah, thatanghat thu leh huaihamna tawh mi-a' na suh uh nate a om hi
A mittaw Farisi mite aw, a pualam zong a siangtho a suahtheihna dingin hai leh kuang sunga a om nate a siangtho hisak phot un

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note pen leikang tawh a kizut manin a pualam a hoih mahmah tawh kibang napi-in a sungah misi guh leh a kihhuai nin nam khempeuh a omna hankhuk tawh na kibang uh hi
Tua mah bangin note zong mite' muhin mihoih mahmah bang napi-in na sung tawng taktak uhah mawhna leh kineihkhemna bek a om hi

“Mihoih a kineihkhem, no Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note in a sisa kamsangte' han, a hoih mahmahin bawlin, a nuntakna uh a hoih, a sisate' mualsuangte hoihtakin na zem uh a
‘I pu i pate' khan' lai-in eite a om hi lehang, kamsangte a thah bangun eite in i that kei ding hi,’ na ci uh hi
Note pen kamsangte a that mite' suanlekhakte mah na hih manun na zuaupi uh a gen na hi uh hi
Tua ahih manin i pu i pate' maban zomto vet un
Gul a bang mite' suanlekhak mite aw, hell khuk tun'nading thukhenna panin a suakta dingin bangci-in kilamen thei na hi uh hiam

Note kiangah kamsangte, mipilte, leh siate ka hong paisak ding hi. Note in pawlkhatte thatin, pawl khatte singlamteh tungah khai-in, pawlkhatte na kikhopna uh innsungah na sat ding uh a, khua khat pan khua khatah a banbanin na bawlsia ding uh hi

Tua thu hangin, mawh neilo Abel a kithah huna kipanin biakinn leh biakna tau kikala na thah uh, Barakhiah' tapa Zekhariah hun ciangdongin, mawhna neilo a kithat mite khempeuh hangin gimna note in na thuak ding uh hi
Note kiangah kong genin-ah: Tuhuna mite tungah hih gimna hong tung takpi ding hi.
“Jerusalem, Jerusalem aw, kamsangte na that a, Pasian' sawl kamtaite na denglum hi. Akpi in a kha tawh a note a huai mah bangin na mite ka huainuam tawntung a, ahi zongin na ut kei hi
Tu-in na innte kisusiacip ding hi
Nang kiangah kong genin-ah: ‘Topa' min tawh a hong pai mipa in thupha ngah ta hen,’ na cih hun hong tun' matengin kei nong mu nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
